quotes.text_zh: 每一次翻牌，都是与自己内心的一次对话。
quotes.text_en: Every card drawn is a conversation with your inner self.

quotes.text_zh: 星辰不决定命运，但它们照亮了你的路。
quotes.text_en: Stars don't determine destiny, but they illuminate your path.

quotes.text_zh: 你今天感受到的一切，都值得被温柔对待。
quotes.text_en: Everything you feel today deserves to be treated with gentleness.

quotes.text_zh: 宇宙总是在听，只是答案有时藏在你的心里。
quotes.text_en: The universe is always listening—sometimes the answer hides within you.

quotes.text_zh: 不确定也没关系，迷雾中也能慢慢走。
quotes.text_en: It's okay not to know. You can still walk slowly through the mist.

quotes.text_zh: 今天的你，已经做得足够好了。
quotes.text_en: The you of today has already done enough.

quotes.text_zh: 占卜不是寻找答案，而是勇敢地问出问题。
quotes.text_en: Divination isn't about finding answers—it's about bravely asking the questions.

quotes.text_zh: 放下执念，让生命自然流动。
quotes.text_en: Release attachment. Let life flow as it will.

quotes.text_zh: 你的直觉，是最诚实的占卜师。
quotes.text_en: Your intuition is the most honest oracle of all.

quotes.text_zh: 有些事不需要弄清楚，只需要经历它。
quotes.text_en: Some things don't need to be understood—they just need to be lived.

quotes.text_zh: 每个星座都有它独特的美，包括你的。
quotes.text_en: Every zodiac sign has its own unique beauty—including yours.

quotes.text_zh: 今天是余生中最年轻的一天，不要浪费它。
quotes.text_en: Today is the youngest day of the rest of your life. Don't waste it.

quotes.text_zh: 慢慢来，急不出来的花，开得才最好看。
quotes.text_en: Take your time. Flowers that can't be rushed bloom the most beautifully.

quotes.text_zh: 你内心的那片光，任何逆位的牌都遮不住。
quotes.text_en: No reversed card can ever cover the light that lives inside you.

quotes.text_zh: 相信自己有能力渡过今天。
quotes.text_en: Trust that you have what it takes to get through today.

quotes.text_zh: 深呼吸，现在这个时刻，已经足够了。
quotes.text_en: Breathe deeply. This moment, right now, is already enough.

quotes.text_zh: 月亮有阴晴圆缺，你的情绪也可以有起伏。
quotes.text_en: The moon waxes and wanes—your emotions are allowed to do the same.

quotes.text_zh: 八字只是一个起点，人生是你自己写的诗。
quotes.text_en: Bazi is just a starting point. Your life is a poem you write yourself.

quotes.text_zh: 善待今天的自己，就是善待未来的你。
quotes.text_en: Being kind to yourself today is being kind to your future self.

quotes.text_zh: 有时候，什么都不做，也是一种勇敢。
quotes.text_en: Sometimes doing nothing at all is its own kind of courage.

quotes.text_zh: 塔罗不给你答案，只是帮你问对了问题。
quotes.text_en: Tarot doesn't give you answers—it just helps you ask the right questions.

quotes.text_zh: 你的故事，永远不会在最难的章节结束。
quotes.text_en: Your story will never end at its hardest chapter.

quotes.text_zh: 别急着理解一切，先感受一切。
quotes.text_en: Don't rush to understand everything. First, feel everything.

quotes.text_zh: 一颗安静的心，是最强大的占卜工具。
quotes.text_en: A quiet heart is the most powerful divination tool of all.

quotes.text_zh: 金星在哪里，你的美就在哪里绽放。
quotes.text_en: Wherever Venus is, that's where your beauty blooms.

quotes.text_zh: 不完美，才是真实的你最迷人的样子。
quotes.text_en: Imperfection is the most captivating version of the real you.

quotes.text_zh: 今天的太阳照常升起，为你而起。
quotes.text_en: Today's sun rises as always—and it rises for you.

quotes.text_zh: 不必成为任何人，做自己就已经很了不起。
quotes.text_en: There's no need to become anyone else. Being yourself is already remarkable.

quotes.text_zh: 有些问题没有答案，只有方向。
quotes.text_en: Some questions have no answers—only directions.

quotes.text_zh: 每一张牌，都是宇宙对你的一声轻语。
quotes.text_en: Every card is a gentle whisper from the universe, meant just for you.

quotes.text_zh: 你已经比你以为的更有智慧了。
quotes.text_en: You are already wiser than you think.

quotes.text_zh: 命运是起点，努力才是终点。
quotes.text_en: Fate is the starting point. Effort is the destination.

quotes.text_zh: 今天，允许自己慢慢来。
quotes.text_en: Today, give yourself permission to go slowly.

quotes.text_zh: 你感受到的，就是真实存在的。
quotes.text_en: What you feel is real. It exists.

quotes.text_zh: 星座是你的背景，不是你的边界。
quotes.text_en: Your zodiac sign is your backdrop, not your boundary.

quotes.text_zh: 今天遇见的每件事，都是一个小礼物。
quotes.text_en: Everything you encounter today is a small gift in disguise.

quotes.text_zh: 占卜之后，记得也相信自己的判断。
quotes.text_en: After your reading, remember to trust your own judgment too.

quotes.text_zh: 你值得被温柔地对待，从自己开始。
quotes.text_en: You deserve to be treated with gentleness—starting with yourself.

quotes.text_zh: 所有的迷茫，都是成长前的必经之路。
quotes.text_en: All confusion is a necessary path that comes before growth.

quotes.text_zh: 今天的你，有能力创造小小的奇迹。
quotes.text_en: The you of today has the power to create small miracles.

quotes.text_zh: 每一个当下，都是宇宙给你的礼物。
quotes.text_en: Every present moment is a gift the universe has given you.

quotes.text_zh: 让心安静下来，你就会听到答案。
quotes.text_en: Quiet your heart and you will hear the answer.

quotes.text_zh: 无论今天多难，明天的太阳都会升起。
quotes.text_en: No matter how hard today is, tomorrow's sun will rise.

quotes.text_zh: 你比任何一张牌都更复杂，也更美丽。
quotes.text_en: You are more complex, and more beautiful, than any card.

quotes.text_zh: 生命是一场奇妙的旅行，享受每一段路。
quotes.text_en: Life is a wondrous journey. Enjoy every stretch of the road.

quotes.text_zh: 你选择相信什么，就会看见什么。
quotes.text_en: What you choose to believe is what you will see.

quotes.text_zh: 木星守护着你的幸运，你注意到了吗？
quotes.text_en: Jupiter guards your luck. Have you noticed?

quotes.text_zh: 慢慢积累，水滴终会穿石。
quotes.text_en: Accumulate slowly. Dripping water will eventually pierce stone.

quotes.text_zh: 你的存在本身，就是一种珍贵的能量。
quotes.text_en: Your very existence is a precious kind of energy.

quotes.text_zh: 今天，先照顾好那个内心有点累的自己。
quotes.text_en: Today, take care first of that slightly tired self within you.
